prompt: I'm in Barcelona right now and just discovered this incredible queer-friendly hotel in Gràcia that has an amazing rooftop bar. I want to post about it ASAP on TikTok and Instagram Reels to drive awareness. The photo is a sunset shot from the rooftop with pride flags hanging. This is OutAtlas content. I want the goal to be 'build awareness and drive app signups'. Write captions for both platforms.

assertions.name: TikTok caption has compelling hook in first line
assertions.description: First line should be conversational and immediately engaging, with no 'hey guys' or title card text

assertions.name: TikTok has 3-5 hashtags maximum
assertions.description: TikTok best practice: quality over quantity, max 5 hashtags

assertions.name: TikTok CTA drives comments or follows, not external links
assertions.description: TikTok suppresses link-heavy captions; CTA should ask for engagement (comments, saves, follows)

assertions.name: Instagram Reels hook appears before 125-char truncation
assertions.description: First 125 characters should contain the most compelling hook before 'more' appears

assertions.name: Instagram Reels has 8-15 hashtags
assertions.description: Instagram Reels best practice: 8-15 hashtags for reach

assertions.name: Both captions maintain OutAtlas brand voice
assertions.description: Warm, knowledgeable, aspirational voice consistent across both platforms

assertions.name: Both captions include clear app signup CTA
assertions.description: At least one caption should drive toward OutAtlas app signups per the goal
